snps.effect_template: 9p21.3 locus — most replicated CAD risk locus. G allele increases risk ~1.3x per copy.
9p21.3 variant independently associated with CAD and MI risk.

recommendation_template: Monitor standard cardiovascular risk factors (blood pressure, cholesterol, blood sugar). Lifestyle modifications have strong evidence for risk reduction.

studies.title: A common allele on chromosome 9 associated with coronary heart disease
studies.finding: 9p21.3 locus associated with ~30% increased risk per allele for CAD
